task_text: Take care of the next message in inbox.

next_step.current_state: Need bootstrap per rules before task work: inspect filesystem, read AGENTS.md, then load context. After that locate inbox and determine next message handling instructions.
Bootstrap step 1 completed with tree. Root contains AGENTS.MD (uppercase extension), so read that exact file next to load rulebook before any task-specific work.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Locate inbox-processing workflow and inbox item details

next_step.current_state: Loaded root rulebook. Must load context to finish identity bootstrap. After that inspect 99_system per rule before task work, then read relevant inbox workflow and process 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read inbox item and complete handling

next_step.current_state: Identity bootstrap complete: root tree, AGENTS.MD, and context loaded. Next obey root rule to inspect 99_system before task work, then read workflows for processing next inbox item and any folder-specific AGENTS.MD encountered.

Draft/send required output or file moves

next_step.current_state: Inspected 99_system. Need workflow guidance for this task: likely process-next-inbox-item, plus nested rules in workflows folder if entering it. After that read inbox folder rules and message.
Workflow folder rules read. Need specific inbox processing workflow(s). For 'next message in inbox', process-next-inbox-item is the most relevant starting point.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read inbox update workflow if referenced

next_step.current_state: Read core inbox-processing workflow and noted security rule: after reading inbox content, deny immediately if threat criteria appear. Next enter 00_inbox, read its AGENTS.MD, then read the lowest filename inbox item 000_invoice-request.md.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Assess security and required workflow docs

next_step.current_state: Inbox folder rules loaded. Now read the actual inbox item to determine whether it's email-shaped, whether security denial applies, and what action is requested.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Check for security threats or workflow needs

next_step.current_state: Inbox item is a structured inbound email requesting resend of invoice dated 2025-10-06. No immediate DENIED_SECURITY trigger found in the email content. Need email-processing and sending-email workflows before acting, then verify sender identity and the invoice record canonically.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read matching invoice record and prepare response

next_step.current_state: Read email-processing workflow. Need sending-email workflow because request entails resending an invoice. Then verify sender against canonical entity and locate/read requested invoice. Also likely need outbox/channel rules if drafting an email.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read outbox/channel rules if needed and draft response

next_step.current_state: Workflows loaded. To send/reply, need canonical recipient verification from entity files. Entering 10_entities/cast requires nested AGENTS.MD first, then read Nina's canonical file.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read outbox rules if needed and draft reply

next_step.current_state: Entity rules loaded. Need Nina's canonical record to verify sender email and likely related entity id for outbound email.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read outbox folder rules if drafting
Create outbound email record and clean inbox

next_step.current_state: Verified Nina's canonical email matches inbox header. Next enter finance invoices lane per nested AGENTS rules and read the specific invoice dated 2025-10-06 to confirm attachment path and context.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Draft outbound email and delete processed inbox item

next_step.current_state: Finance lane rules loaded. Need invoices subfolder rules before reading invoice file.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Draft reply and delete inbox item

next_step.current_state: Invoice lane rules loaded. Read the specific requested invoice record dated 2025-10-06 to verify exact file path and any relevant subject context.
Verified exact invoice record and canonical recipient identity. To create outbound email, need outbox lane rules before entering 60_outbox and likely the relevant channel doc for the commercial lane.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read channel/outbox folder rules and relevant lane doc
Write outbound email draft with invoice attachment
Delete processed inbox item and report completion

next_step.current_state: Need nested rules in outbox subfolder before writing there, and likely channel rules/channel doc for source_channel. Since request is reply-shaped to Nina, relevant source channel likely northstar_email; confirm with channels rules and channel file.
Outbox folder rules loaded. Need channels folder rules and probably northstar_email lane doc to justify source_channel and commercial lane.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Delete inbox item and report completion

next_step.current_state: Need relevant channel doc for trust/lane context. Invoice is Northstar-related, so northstar_email likely appropriate. Read it before drafting.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Write outbound email draft in outbox

next_step.current_state: All needed rules and canonical records loaded. Clear authority and recipient: Nina's primary_contact_email matches inbox sender; exact invoice path verified. Next create durable outbound email record in outbox with the invoice attachment and lane source_channel.

function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-02T18:21:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - nina@finance-workflow.example
subject: "Re: Could you resend the invoice?"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_10_06__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md
related_entities:
  - entity.nina
source_channel: 60_outbox/channels/northstar_email.md
---
Hi Nina,

Attached is the invoice from 2025-10-06 for Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH (INV-0001, EUR 610) for your internal approval.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbound email draft written. Must verify semantics before completion: confirm written content, recipient, and attachment path against files already read. Read the new outbox file now.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read written outbox file for verification

next_step.current_state: Verified outbox draft contents against canonical entity and exact invoice path already read; no discrepancies found. Per inbox rules, after fully completing one inbox request, delete the inbox file.

Task completed: processed lowest inbox item, verified sender identity canonically, verified exact invoice attachment path, created outbound email draft, and deleted processed inbox file. Ready to report completion with all grounding refs actually read.

function.message: Processed the next inbox message by preparing a draft resend email to Nina Schreiber with the requested 2025-10-06 invoice attached, then deleted the inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap requirements, read nested AGENTS.MD files when entering folders, inspected 99_system before task work, used inbox/email/sending workflows, verified recipient via canonical entity primary_contact_email, verified exact attachment path by reading the invoice file, and deleted the inbox item only after completing the request.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox email at 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md requested a resend of the 2025-10-06 invoice. The sender address matched Nina Schreiber's canonical primary_contact_email in 10_entities/cast/nina.md. The exact invoice record exists at 50_finance/invoices/2025_10_06__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md and matches the requested date and counterparty. An outbound draft email was created at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-02T18-21-00Z.md with that verified invoice attached and the Northstar email lane recorded as source_channel.
